---
title: Alliance wiki
author: Marie-Hélène Burle
---

:::{.def}

The wiki is the first place to visit to learn how to use the Alliance supercomputers. This page links to key places to get you started or get help.

:::

:::{layout="[3, 3, 3, 3]"}

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body}

[Wiki front page](https://docs.alliancecan.ca/wiki/Technical_documentation){.card-title3big .stretched-link}

[Start here to use the wiki]{.button-subtitle}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body}

[System status](https://status.alliancecan.ca/){.card-title3big .stretched-link}

[Status of the Alliance clusters]{.button-subtitle}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body}

[Running jobs](https://docs.alliancecan.ca/wiki/Running_jobs){.card-title3big .stretched-link}

[How to submit jobs to Slurm]{.button-subtitle}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body}

[Support](https://docs.alliancecan.ca/wiki/Technical_support){.card-title3big .stretched-link}

[Get help with the Alliance clusters]{.button-subtitle}

:::

:::

:::
